title: Parapet Coping — Prefinished Metal over TPO Base Flashing
notes: Metal coping with continuous cleat. TPO base flashing extends over parapet top. Coping overlaps base flashing min 2 inches. Sealant at cleat-to-flashing interface. Coping joints lapped min 4 inches with sealant. Thermal insulation terminates at parapet inside face.
